# QuizMaster Project Instructions

This is a React-based quiz application called "QuizMaster" built with Vite and React hooks.

## Project Structure
- Use functional components with React Hooks
- Implement Context API for authentication state management
- Use Lucide React icons throughout the interface
- Follow modern React patterns and best practices

## Key Features
- Authentication system with demo account
- Quiz creation and management
- Dashboard for personal quiz management
- Quiz taking interface with scoring
- Leaderboard functionality
- Responsive design with modern UI

## Code Style
- Use consistent naming conventions
- Implement proper error handling
- Follow component composition patterns
- Use proper TypeScript/JavaScript conventions
- Maintain clean, readable code structure
